name: Comparative Study of Multi-Agent Actor-Critic Algorithms in Parameterized Action Reinforcement Learning

description: arXiv:2607.19117v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Parameterized action reinforcement learning has shown strong performance in environments requiring both discrete action selection and continuous parameterization. Prior work established the effectiveness of single-agent actor-critic algorithms - Greedy Actor-Critic (GAC), Soft Actor-Critic (SAC), and Truncated Quantile Critics (TQC) - on benchmark...
author: Ubayd Ali Bapoo, Clement N Nyirenda
